attributes.action: Ban 13 and under from Social Media rather than 16 and under
attributes.additional_details: Banning people from social media is like bunning kids from a playground, yes there are bad people on social media, but there are also bad people at the playground, but you don't ban the children from the playground because of it.
attributes.background: Rather than preventing people under the age of 16 from any access to social media, the age should be for 13 years and under

rejection.details:
You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: 

Government ban on social media to be for under 13s only
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/757849
